loading.title: Preparing your offline workspace
loading.subtitle: Restoring trusted uploads, rewards, literacy progress, and NGO coordination signals.

onboarding.heroDescription: A deeply polished conservation platform for rural forest-edge communities, trusted by guardians and NGOs in low-connectivity terrain.

features.rewards: Rewards, savings, and literacy in one mobile workflow
features.sync: Persistent local state with reconnect-ready sync architecture

onboarding.languageSubtitle: Switch instantly, stay offline-first, and keep every screen readable in the field.

dashboard.heroDescription: Your conservation record is alive. Upload field proof, protect savings goals, and keep trust rising across your landscape.

fieldPulse.title: Field pulse
fieldPulse.subtitle: Uploads, review flow, and trust movement update live from your activity record.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Verified contributions reshape your rank automatically.

recentActivities.title: Recent activities
recentActivities.subtitle: Every entry below is persistent and updates status when review or sync changes.
recentActivities.emptySubtitle: Your first upload will immediately shape trust, pending rewards, and the regional leaderboard.

uploads.title: Create field activity
uploads.subtitle: Capture evidence, lock GPS, and persist everything offline before the network returns.
uploads.cameraSheetSubtitle: The app opens the live camera directly and stores a stamped capture for verification.
uploads.cameraOnlyHint: Camera-only evidence. Gallery and document picking are disabled in this flow.
uploads.cameraAccessError: Camera access was blocked or is unavailable on this device.
uploads.cameraReadyError: The camera feed is still warming up. Try again in a moment.
uploads.captureRequirementHint: Both before and after photos must be captured inside the app before this activity can be saved.
uploads.gpsHint: Tap the GPS lock to capture a precise field signal.
uploads.offlineQueueSubtitle: Queued or weak-signal activities stay persistent and can be retried safely.
uploads.queueClearSubtitle: Uploads are either synced already or ready for NGO review.

rewards.savingsSubtitle: Savings behavior is persistent and feeds trust-building signals.
rewards.ledgerSubtitle: Rewards, literacy bonuses, and savings movements recalculate live balances.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose how the app speaks to you. Changes are instant and saved locally for offline use.

profile.title: Profile and identity
profile.subtitle: Persistent session, role-aware access, and region-specific leaderboard participation.
profile.trustSubtitle: Every approval, savings movement, and module completion keeps this profile alive.

literacy.journeySubtitle: Module unlocks and quiz outcomes persist locally and sync with the broader program state.

forest-income-basics.title: Forest Income Basics
lessons: Conservation rewards are strongest when every activity has a clear record, a place, and a purpose.
Your wallet is not just a number. It is the living record of trusted work across your forest route.
Separating earned balance, pending rewards, and savings helps households make calmer financial decisions.

quiz.prompt: What strengthens trust in your rewards?
Why separate savings from available balance?

savings-habits.title: Savings Habits for Lean Seasons
lessons: Small weekly savings movements can matter more than one large move made too late.
Naming a savings goal helps families keep direction during uncertain income cycles.
Savings consistency is a signal of future resilience, not just present discipline.

quiz.prompt: What makes a goal easier to protect?

trust-and-credit.title: Trust, Proof, and Credit
lessons: Trust grows from repeated approvals, honest uploads, and stable participation.
A high trust score can support future NGO recommendations and credit-readiness conversations.
Rejected or weakly documented work lowers confidence, so quality matters as much as quantity.

family-budget-planning.title: Family Budget Planning
lessons: A simple budget works best when each rupee or credit has one clear job.
Irregular income months still benefit from a steady split between essentials, savings, and buffers.
Budgeting is not restriction. It is protection for future decisions.

quiz.prompt: What is the purpose of a budget?
What helps with uneven income months?
answers: A stable savings and essentials split

fraud-and-safety.title: Fraud and Safety in the Field
lessons: Accurate uploads protect both your reputation and the credibility of the community program.
Device sharing, duplicate evidence, and unclear timestamps create avoidable trust damage.
Safety means honest reporting, guarded devices, and quick clarification when the NGO requests it.

quiz.prompt: What should happen after an NGO clarification request?

regionFilter.title: Region filter
regionFilter.subtitle: Moderation, leaderboard, and guardian analytics update instantly by landscape.

queue.title: Verification queue
queue.subtitle: Approvals and rejections update guardian wallets, trust, and rankings in real time.
queue.emptySubtitle: When guardians upload new field work, moderation cards will appear here automatically.

guardianAnalytics.title: Guardian analytics
guardianAnalytics.subtitle: Trust signals and wallet growth are derived directly from reviewed work.

regionalLeaderboard.title: Regional leaderboard
regionalLeaderboard.subtitle: Approved work automatically recalculates rank and impact metrics.

exports.title: Program exports
exports.subtitle: Lightweight field-ready CSVs for donor reports, audits, and regional review.
exports.note: Exports reflect the latest local-first state, including offline-reviewed changes.

errors.generic: Something went wrong while processing your request.
errors.duplicatePhone: An account with this phone number already exists.
errors.invalidLogin: Phone number or passcode is incorrect.
errors.noAccountsOnUrl: No saved accounts exist on this app URL yet. If you signed up on another port or on localhost instead of 127.0.0.1, reopen that exact URL to log in.
errors.phoneNotFoundOnUrl: No saved account matches this phone number on the current app URL.
errors.incorrectPasscode: The passcode is incorrect for this saved account.
errors.savingsExceedsBalance: Savings transfer exceeds the available wallet balance.
errors.capturePairRequired: Both before and after evidence must be captured in-app before saving this activity.
errors.cameraOnlyEvidence: Evidence must be captured directly in the app camera.
